Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 4tb October, 1986 in the Ministry of Commerce No, G,S.R. 1145, dated tho 22nd September, 1986, inviting obJec tions and susacstion, from all persons likely to be IltIeeted thereby; And wbereas the ~d.id Gazette was made available to the pubhc on the 4th October, 1986; And wheroas the obJection~ and sllggestioDll bllve not been received so far; Now, therefore. in exercise of the powers conferred by sub-section (1) of section 49 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby makes the following rules, Damely: 1. (1) These rulcs roilY be called tbe Tea (Amendment) Rules, 1987. (2) "These shall come into force {In the date of their publication in the Officilll Gaz.ette. 2.
